raw.subject: Epemaz Barber shop in Fargo; Something I noticed about your confidence boost
raw.body:
Hi,

I saw your post about a fresh cut from you causing extreme confidence, and I have to say, it's a great way to start the day! Your photos and posts give a great feel for your shop and the community you serve.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving some potential customers wondering how to get in touch or book an appointment.

I sketched up a page idea for you from what I've seen on Facebook, with a menu hero, hours block, photo gallery, and map & directions. It's just a starting point, but I thought it might be worth sharing.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/epemaz-barber-shop-fargo

It's a straightforward project to bring this online, with a flat fee for local businesses like yours. If you're interested in learning more, I'd be happy to discuss details over a quick call or reply to this email.
